output: Jane has already saved $4 per week for 8 weeks, which totals $4 × 8 = $32. She needs $60, so she still needs $60 - $32 = $28. At a rate of $4 per week, the number of additional weeks required is $28 ÷ $4 = 7 weeks. Therefore, Jane needs 7 more weeks to save enough money.

There are 20 cars in total. Out of these, 12 are automatic and 4 are manual. The remaining cars are semi-automatic:  
20 - 12 - 4 = 4.  
The fraction of semi-automatic cars is 4/20 = 0.2, which is 20%.  
Thus, 20% of the cars are semi-automatic.
